title: Block Cutter
description: Adds quality of life features to the stonecutter and more!
body: # Block Cutter ## Download: [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/datapack/block-cutter/version/latest) ### Minecraft Versions: 1.21 - 1.21.11 Adds quality of life features to the stonecutter and more! ## Features - Convert 1 plank into 2 slabs, 1 stair or 2 trapdoors - Craft slabs, stairs and walls back into blocks - Convert logs into wood ## Wiki **Recipes**: **Installing:** Insert the zip file into your datapacks folder. **Uninstalling:** Delete the zip file.
